MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Apr-23-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. Tentative Ruling adopted as order of the court: Defendant GRUBB & ELLIS's motion for summary judgment is off calendar for failure to provide courtesy copies pursuant to Court's directive on April 11th tentative ruling system. (JJM/MD) Reporter: Eric Throne, CSR # 7855

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Apr-12-2002 Continued To Apr-23-02 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES:
Defendant Grubb & Ellis Company's motion for summary judgment continued to April 23, 2002, per the court's own motion. Parties to submit courtesy copies to Department 301 by April 17, 2002. (JJM/MD) Eric L. Throne, CSR 7855
